description: Cross-app shared types — atom types and predicates that appear across multiple ecosystem apps. All apps MUST use these exact IDs for consistency.

sharedAtomTypes.label: Person / User
sharedAtomTypes.description: Wallet address. Universal identity across all Intuition apps.

sharedAtomTypes.label: Concept / Tag
sharedAtomTypes.description: Abstract concept, skill, value, or classification term.

sharedAtomTypes.label: Smart Contract
sharedAtomTypes.description: On-chain smart contract (e.g., Fee Proxy, MultiVault).

sharedPredicates.label: member of
sharedPredicates.description: Person belongs to an organization or community.
